seoTitle: Doongul vs Doughboy — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Doongul and Doughboy. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Doongul and Doughboy.
heading: Doongul vs Doughboy — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Doongul, Queensland and Doughboy, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Doughboy has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Doongul (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Doongul or Doughboy safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Doongul has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Doughboy scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Doongul scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Doughboy scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Doongul or Doughboy?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Doughboy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
